text: Client ne contract cancel kar diya aur mera chota startup band hone wala hai, par main thak kar baith nahi sakti kyunki bache ki fees aur home loan ki EMI mujh par hi tiki hai. Ghar par bacha ro raha hai aur office mein kaam ka dher hai, phir bhi mujhe bina ruke endure karna hoga kyunki mere girne ka matlab pura parivaar bikhar jana hai. Thakan itni hai ki aankhein band ho rahi hain, par 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta.

Business loss ke baad dimaag fatne ko hai par main bache ko sote huye chhod kar naye clients dhoondne nikal gayi hoon kyunki failure ka koi margin nahi hai. Sasural ki umeedon aur MNC ki purani kadi mehnat ke baad ab main haar nahi maan sakti, bhale hi guilt mujhe andar se kha raha ho. Structural endurance hi mera ekmatra rasta hai kyunki Papa ki sarkari naukri ki pension se ghar nahi chal sakta.

Aaj bada contract cancel ho gaya aur mera career khatam lag raha hai, par main rone ke bajaye kitchen aur laptop ke beech bhag rahi hoon kyunki endurance hi meri kismat hai. First-gen earner hone ka yahi bojh hai ki bache ke saath waqt bitana ek luxury lagta hai jo main afford nahi kar sakti. Shareer jawab de raha hai par parivaar ki 'izzat' aur kirana shop ka udhaar mujhe rukne ki ijaazat nahi deta.

Funding rukne se startup band hone ki kagar par hai, par main bache ko god mein lekar presentation bana rahi hoon kyunki failure parivaar ke liye paap jaisa hoga. Meri suppressed ambition ab bas ek structural endurance ban gayi hai taaki ghar ki stability bani rahe aur kisan baap ka sar nicha na ho. Thakan aur exhaustion ab meri pehchaan ban chuki hain, par mere kandhon par poore khandaan ka bojh hai.

Client ke contract loss ke baad main 16 ghante kaam kar rahi hoon, bhale hi bache ki yaad mein dil tadap raha ho, par mere paas rukne ka vikalp nahi hai. Parivaar ko lagta hai main career-oriented hoon, par ye bas ek majboori hai kyunki sole earner hone ka matlab hai har din ki structural endurance. Main apni mental health ke baare mein soch bhi nahi sakti kyunki mera 'kartavya' hi ab meri poori zindagi hai.
